subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A heated water service must be in accordance with AS/NZS 3500.4 with the following variations:

ol.li: For clause 5.8 delete Note 1 and insert: Note 1 - An expansion control valve or expansion vessel must be incorporated in the installation of an unvented water heater otherwise the temperature/pressure relief valve may become blocked due to the deposition of calcium carbonate from the heated water that is relieved during thermal expansion. See Figures 5.9.4(C) and 5.9.(D)(a).
For Table 5.9.1(A), in the row relating to Expansion control valve or expansion vessel (Australia only) in the 3rd and 4th columns deleted “g” and insert: Yes.
